name: Crock Pot Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 16 oz Can diced tomatoes with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the roast on top of the stove beforehand, although this is not necessary. Brown it on all sides in a little vegetable oil.
2. Place the onion and carrots on the bottom of the crock pot (a 4 quart crock pot is recommended for this recipe).
3. Put the meat on top and season to taste with salt and pepper.
4. Pour the tomatoes over everything.
5. Cook on low for 8 to 10 hours, or on high for 4 to 5 hours.
6. This dish is particularly wonderful served with noodles or mashed potatoes alongside.
7. If you can manage to do the prep work the night before, it's a good meal for those times when you'll be out all day and want to come home to something comforting. Enjoy!
